reviews.review_description:
Okay I know the term asset flip seems bad these days but hold on and hear me out before you start ranting at me or them.

1. The game is three bucks and the devs aren't done with it yet. They know what their game is worth and that's to be respected.

2. As stated the devs have plans to add content. 3 bucks for a subnautica style early access is pretty good to me. 

3. Ever played blood and bacon on steam? Yeah think of this as your VR equivalent. It's not some AAA blockbuster it's a simple 2 step zombie shooter and it does that perfectly fine.

4. Unlike most things that seem like asset flips this game is POLISHED. No bugs that I noticed, smooth framerate, things look a little blocky in some places and the zombies look oiled up but everything looks carefully clicked into place. If they say they built all this from scratch I'd be inclined to believe em. 

Since you guys are intent on improvements lemme give you a few bulletpoints to work with. 

1. There needs to be a mode without escorting that kid. I'm sure it won't take too long to slap together a toggle to turn her off. Or you could just turn her invincible or something I dunno. Whatever works for you I just know how people DESPISE escort missions. 

2. It says you are failed when you lose. It should be you HAVE failed. I assume you guys don't speak English so I know getting told about those types of things can help out. Don't beat yourself up over it it happens to everybody. Learning new languages sucks. 

3. Add a mag drop/manual reload button. I cannot express how frustrating it is to have to waste ammo into the floor because I can't pop the mag out of my pistol. You have a mag refill mechanic which is great but nothing can replace a reload button in a shooter. It's a shot of dopamine we've come to love too much. You could also just let us yank the mag out too. Whichever is easier on you guys. 

4. The shotgun you guys are using loads from the bottom you have us loading it through the ejector port. This is probably more my gun autism than anything else but it's just really weird loading all those shells through the ejector port. 

5. The pistol could use a second hand grip. What I mean by that is it feels really weird to just one Hand a pistol like that. You're supposed to hold it with both hands. If you need an idea of how that feels and looks zero caliber 2 just put out a free shooting range and I think they have the pistol you're using too. Plus it's fun and great for short breaks when you got em. 

I'll keep an eye out for updates on the game and try to remember to check em out. Look forward to seeing what you guys come up with. 

Also one little wishlist thing from a new player. If you guys wind up tossing around the idea for a revolver I'd love one to play with.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the thoughtful and detailed feedback — it really means a lot to us! We’re thrilled you found the gameplay polished and fun, even at this early stage.

We’ve taken your companion/escort feedback to heart: our latest build (now live!) includes a mode without her, and for players who keep her on, we’re continuing to refine her role so she feels more supportive and less intrusive.

Your notes on reload mechanics, pistol grip, shotgun loading, and language tweaks are incredibly helpful, and we’ll be incorporating them as we polish the experience further.
As for the revolver — we love the idea, and it’s definitely on our list to bring into the game soon.
We truly appreciate your support and patience as we keep building this out. Exciting updates are on the way, and we can’t wait for you to see what’s next!

reviews.review_description: Obviously its in early access and theres only one stage and a training area(says a new stage coming soon). Gunplay is solid with the three choices available. Graphics are passable. Sound design could be more varied. AGAIN this is early access so they still have plenty to add but it works for a nice time waster.

developer_response.body:
"Thanks a ton for playing and sharing your thoughts! 🧟‍♂️🔫
We’re thrilled you enjoyed the gunplay, and you’re right — this is just the beginning. More stages, new weapons, and a richer soundscape are already on the way to keep things intense and immersive. Your feedback keeps us aiming higher — can’t wait for you to see what’s next!"

reviews.review_description: The guns are cool. I like also the animations of the zombies

developer_response.body: Marcusblack, Thanks a lot for the great review! 🎯 We're thrilled you’re enjoying the guns and zombie animations — we worked hard to make them feel epic. And guess what? We’re soon adding a companion character that you’ll need to protect from zombies, adding a whole new layer of strategy and excitement! 🧟‍♂️🤝🔥 Stay tuned!
